title: Missing session guards — DDL without lock_wait_timeout risks cascading MDL block
migration_snippet:
-- V2__add_index.sql
ALTER TABLE orders ADD INDEX idx_created_at (created_at), ALGORITHM=INPLACE, LOCK=NONE;
expected_feedback: Critical: DDL missing session guards. If a long-running transaction holds a metadata lock, this ALTER will block indefinitely — and every subsequent query queues behind it. Add SET SESSION lock_wait_timeout = 3; and SET SESSION innodb_lock_wait_timeout = 3; before the ALTER.
